data.body: B3 PR #24 opened to main with auto-merge (CI green so far: 21 pass / 5 pending). Continued to B1 (knotty-hat-chase) on branch feat/production-batch-runner off main ea79ecca: plan-review PASS (blocking=0, only file_impact advisory -> remediated), claimed, file_impact set. Recorded the core B1 design finding (BatchRunner-seam <-> sizing.py impedance mismatch; design A = ProductionBatchRunner holds its own rebar.llm.Runner+LLMConfig and drives pass1_with_ladder/shed_to_budget/checkpointing, journaling an enforced batch_plan). B1 implementation NOT yet started — clean claimed+planned checkpoint. Remaining epic B: B1 (claimed), B2/B4/B5/B6 (open, dependency-wired).
